text:
blender 2.66a is not start

log:

LOR49% blender
Assertion failed: (findOption(Name) == Values.size() && "Option already exists!"), function addLiteralOption, file /usr/ports/devel/llvm/work/llvm-3.2.src/include/llvm/Support/CommandLine.h, line 646.
zsh: abort (core dumped)  blender

LOR49% pkg info|grep blender
blender-2.66a                  3D modeling/rendering/animation/gaming package

LOR49% pkg info|grep llvm   
llvm-3.2                       Low Level Virtual Machine

LOR49% pkg info|grep clang
clang-3.2_1                    C, Objective-C, and C++ compiler

LOR49% cat /etc/make.conf
RUBY_DEFAULT_VER=1.9
WITH_PKGNG=yes
# added by use.perl 2013-04-10 02:01:07
PERL_VERSION=5.16.2
CC=clang
CXX=clang++
CPP=clang-cpp
